diagrams.title: Dijkstra Algorithm Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step execution of Dijkstra's algorithm on a sample graph with 5 vertices
elements: Priority queue showing vertices with tentative distances
Dist array showing current shortest distances
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how the algorithm progressively finds shortest paths

diagrams.title: Relaxation Operation Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the relaxation operation comparing current path vs path through intermediate vertex
elements: Comparison: if new path shorter, update distance
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how distances are updated during algorithm execution

diagrams.title: Priority Queue State Changes
diagrams.description: Shows how the priority queue changes with each vertex extraction and edge relaxation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding data structure operations and their effects
